channel.title: Lake of data
channel.description: hey, i have used beforeSSR with customhandler when i navigate to post with link its also render home data with post data so any way to remove unnecessary home data on viewsource?

item.title: Lake of data
item.dc:creator: juanma
item.description:
Hi @mayank,

Can you share a repo with the code of your project so the community can check your issue? Can you elaborate a bit more on the problem you want to solve?

Read full topic

item.title: Lake of data

item.description:
hey, i have used beforeSSR with customhandler when i navigate to post with link its also render home data with post data so any way to remove unnecessary home data on viewsource?
